reportingPaths.title: Task queue diagnostics
reportingPaths.summary: Use queue and queue data tables to review retry state, queued work, and task payload size.

reportingPaths.title: Search activity tracing
reportingPaths.summary: Connect search instance records to search entry records for current and logged activity.

reportingPaths.title: Instance completion status
reportingPaths.summary: Use completion records for workflow instance completion and retry diagnostics.

reportingQuestions.question: Which workflows, schedules, and runtime records exist?
reportingQuestions.guidance: Start with workflow definition tables, then follow runtime/history relationships for execution reporting.

reportingQuestions.question: How can I inspect workflow activity or error history?
reportingQuestions.guidance: Use activity/history tables and confirm status values before aggregating by state or error.
